compiled_state.title: compact-on-close epic missed updating concurrency-stress, lifecycle, and e2e test thresholds
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Investigation findings: concurrency-stress test was already updated (commit a6a7f5b1) with correct thresholds. Lifecycle and e2e tests are passing but lack explanatory comments about compact-on-close behavior. Low priority — documentation-only issue, not a behavioral bug.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Investigation confirmed: concurrency-stress test already updated (commit a6a7f5b1), lifecycle and e2e tests pass. Low-priority documentation improvement only, not a behavioral bug. Escalated to user.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
